rulings.Case Title: NARCISO S HILO III VS. FIRST FINANCIAL LENDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 24, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., CITIBANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR CERTIFICATEHOLDERS, BEAR STEARNS ALT-A TRUST, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH, EMC MORTGAGE LLC's DEMURRER TO FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to explain in good faith the inconsistencies re cause of default. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WUN YUNG VS. ROBERT SILVER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 24, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT ROBERT SILVER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule five days to answer. Moving party fails to show plaintiff's attorney is a debt collector within meaning of FDCPA. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOVIND PATEL VS. BARBARA JACKIE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 24, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT BARBARA JACKLE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective as to amount due i.e., aks for $1,100.00 but total for both months per notice is $1,050.00. = (501/REQ)
